summary: Created the fingerprint receipt module with three files: format-snapshot.ts (pure formatter mapping SignalSnapshot fields to ReceiptRow[] with fallback copy for missing values), fingerprint-receipt.ts (orchestrator calling collectSnapshot → formatSnapshotToRows → createReceipt), and index.ts (barrel export). All 12 advanced fields are populated: Renderer, Vendor, WebGL Version, Storage, Screen Resolution, Device Pixel Ratio, Touch Support, CPU Threads, Timezone, Languages, Platform, Do Not Track. Unavailable/unknown values display 'Not available'. All 315 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
